name: Salatat Bazinjan Eswed Bel-Filfil
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, peel, and cut the eggplant into medium-sized rings.
2. Place the eggplant in a sieve and sprinkle with salt. Leave for half an hour.
3. Wash off the salt and drain the eggplant. Dry with a towel.
4. Fry each piece of eggplant on both sides until golden brown. Place on paper towels to soak up excess oil.
5. Clean the chili peppers by cutting off the stalk and removing the seeds. Wash, dry, and cut into rings.
6. Fry the chili peppers.
7. Place the fried eggplant on a plate, followed by the tomato rings.
8. Mix the vinegar, salt, and pepper together in a bowl.
9. Pour the dressing over the vegetable rings.
10. Serve chilled.
